violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Sanitizer concentration for the spray bottles was measuring higher than 500ppm.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use items being stored under the sink in the breakfast area. Single use items being stored on the floor in the upstairs storage room.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. No soap provided for the hand sink in the back prep area.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. No disposable towels provided for the hand sink in the back prep area.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Hole in the wall in the prep area.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
